prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 33310→27941→26085→34533→32093，整体波动较大；2021–2023 年持续前移（位次数字减小），2024 年大幅后移至 34533，2025 年回升至约 32093 名，近两年呈震荡走势；2025 年基准约 32093 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 58 人、2022 年 59 人、2023 年 63 人、2024 年 68 人、2025 年 72 人，逐年递增；2026 年计划 97 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招约 34.7%，扩招幅度显著，对报考竞争有推高作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 68 位稳步上升至 2026 年第 61 位，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力和社会认可度增强；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理争议，属校园生活管理类事件，对报考决策影响有限；抖音热度总排名第 38 位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，反映一定关注度；历史投档异常记录中未见西南大学明显断档信号；心理学 A、教育学 A、马克思主义理论 A-，共 3 个 A- 及以上学科；教育学、心理学等优势学科与师范类、综合类院校定位一致，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类主流专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，西南大学开设的计算机、电子信息、电气等专业契合热度方向；湖南省物理类考生 2021 年 20.6 万→2026 年 34.7 万，增幅约 68%，2026 年较 2025 年增加约 8.4%，考生规模持续扩大，竞争压力上升；西南大学位于重庆（邻省），与湖南同属中西部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在湖南省招生计划占比较小（物理类 2025 年 72 人，占该校全国计划比例有限），跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 32093 名、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 34.7%、本省物理类考生增加约 8.4% 以及学校软科排名持续上升等因素：扩招幅度显著高于考生增幅，按供需弹性模型计算位次后移；同时学校排名提升和热门专业热度可能吸引更多高分考生报考，进一步推高竞争。预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 38879 名，区间 38379–39879 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 33310→27941→26085→34533→32093, showing overall significant fluctuations; from 2021 to 2023, it continuously moved forward (ranking number decreased), in 2024 it significantly moved backward to 34533, and in 2025 it rebounded to about 32093, showing a volatile trend in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 32093; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 58 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 72 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 97, a substantial expansion of about 34.7% compared to 2025, which is significant and will push up competition for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and social recognition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management, which is a campus life management incident with limited impact on admission decisions; Douyin popularity total ranking 38th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure is moderately high, reflecting a certain level of attention; no obvious signal of a gap in historical admission records for Southwest University; Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, totaling 3 A- or above disciplines; advantageous disciplines such as Education and Psychology align with the positioning of normal and comprehensive universities, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other mainstream Physics Category majors have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026; Southwest University offers majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering that align with popular directions; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 68%, with an increase of about 8.4% from 2025 to 2026, indicating continuous expansion of the examinee pool and rising competition pressure; Southwest University is located in Chongqing (neighboring province), both in the central and western regions, with moderate regional preference; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan Province accounts for a small proportion (72 in Physics Category in 2025, limited share of the national plan), and the cross-provincial competition pattern is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 32093, the 2026 plan expansion of about 34.7%, the increase in provincial Physics Category examinees of about 8.4%, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking: the expansion rate is significantly higher than the examinee growth rate, and according to the supply-demand elasticity model, the ranking will move backward; at the same time, the university's ranking improvement and the popularity of hot majors may attract more high-scoring examinees, further pushing up competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 38879, with a range of 38379–39879.

Candidates within this ranking range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 38000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering, as well as the flagship Applied Psychology major; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (e.g., outside 39500) are advised to use Tier 3 Rongchang Campus majors as safety options while also striving for Tier 2 majors. There is a clear gradient in admission rankings between Southwest University's Rongchang Campus and Beibei Campus, so candidates should pay attention to the distinction when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4680→5273→4744→4717→4603. In 2022, it once moved back to 5273, but from 2023 to 2025, it continuously moved forward (ranking number decreased), with a cumulative forward movement of about 670 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4603, the best level in the past 5 years. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 19 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, showing a trend of annual reduction. The 2026 plan is 12, a slight increase of 1 (+9.1%) compared to 2025, but the total plan remains at a low level.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management, which is a campus life management incident with limited impact on application decisions. Douyin popularity ranks 38th overall (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms. No obvious gap signal for Southwest University in historical admission anomaly records. Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, totaling 3 A- and above disciplines. Advantageous disciplines such as Education, Psychology, and Marxist Theory are highly aligned with the application direction of History Category candidates, strongly attracting normal university and liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mainstream History Category majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Normal/Education showed differentiated or hot trends from 2024 to 2026. Southwest University offers majors like Law, Ideological and Political Education, and Education, which align with these hot trends. The number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 187,000 in 2026, with a significant increase of about 31.2% in 2026 compared to 2025 (143,000), leading to a notable expansion in candidate scale and a clear rise in competitive pressure. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (neighboring province), sharing the central and western region with Hunan, with moderate regional preference. The university has a small enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province (only 11 in 2025), resulting in a relatively stable cross-provincial competition pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 4603, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan by about 9.1%, the significant increase in provincial History Category candidates by about 31.2%, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking: the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion of the plan, leading to intensified competition. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the ranking will move backward. Meanwhile, the improvement in university ranking and the enhanced attractiveness of advantageous disciplines (Education, Psychology) may further increase competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 4904, with a range of 4404–5404.
